ModMetadata.Name: IC10 Define Workaround
ModMetadata.Author: Vespinian
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
This mod should make defines work with all the l/s/get/put operations again. This is with the caveat that defines must be written before being used and that there is limited testing that I could do.
Programs like this should now be working!
define test $D52
Main: yield l r0 test On seqz r0 r0 s test On r0 j Main
repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/ic10-define-workaround
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500> IC10 Define Workaround </color></size> This is a Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
Makes defines work with all the l/s/get/put operations again. This is with the caveat that defines must be written before being used.
Programs like this should now be working!
define test $D52 Main: yield l r0 test On seqz r0 r0 s test On r0 j Main
repo: https://github.com/Vespinian/ic10-define-workaround
